## ✅ Test Plan

### Unit Tests
- [ ] `pnpm run test` — All tests passing
- [ ] Coverage >= 85% (for new code)
- [ ] Edge cases covered

### Integration Tests
- [ ] API endpoints tested (if backend)
- [ ] Component integration tested (if frontend)
- [ ] Database migration tested (if applicable)

### Manual Testing
- [ ] Tested locally: [steps taken]
- [ ] Happy path: ✅
- [ ] Error handling: ✅
- [ ] Loading states: ✅
- [ ] Responsive design: ✅ (desktop, tablet, mobile)
- [ ] No console errors: ✅

### CodeRabbit Review
- [ ] CodeRabbit executed
- [ ] Auto-healing completed (≤ 2 iterations)
- [ ] No CRITICAL issues remaining
- [ ] HIGH issues fixed or documented

## 🔍 Code Quality

### Quality Checks
- [ ] `pnpm run lint` → No errors
- [ ] `pnpm run type-check` → No type errors
- [ ] `pnpm run build` → Build successful
- [ ] No `console.log` or `debugger` statements
- [ ] No commented-out code
- [ ] Code follows project patterns (CLAUDE.md)

### Security
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets
- [ ] No SQL injection (Prisma used)
- [ ] No XSS vulnerabilities
- [ ] Input validation present
- [ ] Authorization checks (if needed)

### Performance
- [ ] No N+1 queries
- [ ] Database migrations optimized
- [ ] API response times acceptable
- [ ] Frontend render performance OK

---

- [ ] API documentation updated (if backend)
- [ ] Component documentation updated (if frontend)
- [ ] README updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] Database migration rollback tested
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
